title: net_if_set_link_addr return value unchecked
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:588

net_if_set_link_addr() is called but return value is not checked. The function can fail if the interface is not in a valid state.

What goes wrong: If link address setting fails, the interface has no valid link-layer address. Subsequent IPv6 operations that depend on the link address (neighbor discovery, link-local address derivation) would malfunction or use uninitialized data.

The function should check the return and set iface_init_failed on error.
close_reason: Fixed: Added return value check for net_if_set_link_addr() in lichen_l2_iface_init()
